scripts.predev: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const p=execSync('lsof -ti :3000',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim();if(p){console.log('[predev] Killing stale process on port 3000:',p);process.kill(Number(p),'SIGKILL')}}catch{}"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p client/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json
scripts.test:db: node tests/log-runner.mjs vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/integration/dbLogicChain.test.ts
scripts.test:db:scenario: node tests/log-runner.mjs vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/integration/dbScenario.test.ts
scripts.test:db:all: node tests/log-runner.mjs vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts tests/integration/dbLogicChain.test.ts tests/integration/dbScenario.test.ts tests/integration/persistence.test.ts tests/integration/dbIsolation.test.ts
scripts.gate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run test:integration && npm run test:db:all && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:evaluation
